title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.400 - County reimbursed for abstract furnished to any city, town or village
text:
137.400.  County reimbursed for abstract furnished to any city, town or village. — The county shall be reimbursed in the amount of the actual cost and expense to the county in the preparation of an abstract of assessment required to be furnished to any city, town or village by the county clerk or other county officer.
(L. 1945 p. 1930 § 20)
